Field Note: Pick a country and watch the Region field below offer ONLY that country's regions. Change country AFTER picking a region: the stale region stays visible + flagged and the save is blocked until repicked.
With no country picked ALL four regions show (no active branch = no filter).

Field Note: Second cascade level: the shown sites follow the country+region combination. On Safari especially: hidden options must be truly absent from the list. Select a site then change region: the stale site stays in the list but disabled + flagged.
Controls the retired option on the Method dropdown below.
Option 9 is hidden unless Legacy=Yes. Set Legacy=Yes then pick 9 then set Legacy=No: 9 stays visible but disabled + flagged; the save asks for confirmation.
Field Annotation: @UVCHOICES={"when":"[uch_legacy]<>'1'","hide":["9"],"message":"Legacy culture is retired — switch Legacy data entry to Yes if this is a historic record.","blockSave":"confirm"}

Field Note: Ticking this restricts the Outreach channels checkboxes below.

Field Annotation: @UVCHOICES={"when":"[uch_pilot(1)]='1'","show":["1","2"],"message":"Only Radio and TV are available during the pilot phase.","blockSave":"hard"}
